seoTitle: Hamelin Bay vs Hamersley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hamelin Bay and Hamersley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hamelin Bay vs Hamersley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamelin Bay and Hamersley.
heading: Hamelin Bay vs Hamersley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamelin Bay, Western Australia and Hamersley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamelin Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Hamersley (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamelin Bay or Hamersley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamelin Bay has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Hamersley scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamelin Bay scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Hamersley scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamelin Bay or Hamersley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamelin Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
